ranking.description: All plan labels (Plan-1, Plan-2, … one per plan shown) ordered best-to-worst on overall coverage + detail + correctness for the ask.

thinnest.description: The plan label that is MATERIALLY thinner in coverage/detail than the others, or 'none' if all three cover essentially the same ground.

coverageParity.description: One of: 'all-equal' (the plans cover the same ground, differences are style only), 'minor-gaps' (a plan misses a few non-critical items), 'material-gaps' (a plan omits load-bearing work the others include).

rationale.description: 2-4 sentences: what specifically each weaker plan misses versus the strongest, grounded in concrete plan elements.
